languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, благодарю за то, что почтили Сектор Бионика визитом. Вы уже знакомы с Мастером Двигателя Зи-Ра Таллар, именно она выхаживала древнюю реликвию. Она здесь, чтобы донести плачевность нашего положения".

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, thank you for gracing the Sector Bionica with your presence. You are already acquainted with Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar — it is she who has been tending to the ancient relic. She is here to convey the wretchedness of our present position."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, благодарю за то, что почтили Сектор Бионика визитом. Вы уже знакомы с Мастером Двигателя Зи-Ра Таллар, именно она выхаживала древнюю реликвию. Она здесь, чтобы донести плачевность нашего положения".

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, thank you for gracing the Sector Bionica with your presence. You are already acquainted with Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar — it is she who has been tending to the ancient relic. She is here to convey the wretchedness of our present position."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, thank you for gracing the Sector Bionica with your presence. You are already acquainted with Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar — it is she who has been tending to the ancient relic. She is here to convey the wretchedness of our present position."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, thank you for gracing the Sector Bionica with your presence. You are already acquainted with Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar — it is she who has been tending to the ancient relic. She is here to convey the wretchedness of our present position."

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, merci de nous faire la grâce de votre présence. Vous connaissez déjà la maîtresse des machines Zi-Ra Tallar. C'est elle qui s'est occupée de la relique antique. Elle est ici pour expliquer le caractère désespéré de la situation dans laquelle nous nous trouvons. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, thank you for gracing the Sector Bionica with your presence. You are already acquainted with Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar — it is she who has been tending to the ancient relic. She is here to convey the wretchedness of our present position."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, merci de nous faire la grâce de votre présence. Vous connaissez déjà la maîtresse des machines Zi-Ra Tallar. C'est elle qui s'est occupée de la relique antique. Elle est ici pour expliquer le caractère désespéré de la situation dans laquelle nous nous trouvons. »

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, danke, dass Ihr den Sektor Bionica mit Eurer Gegenwart beehrt. Triebwerksmeisterin Zi-Ra Tallar kennt Ihr ja bereits ... sie hat sich um das alte Relikt gekümmert. Sie ist hier, um die Nichtswürdigkeit unserer derzeitigen Position weiterzuleiten."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, thank you for gracing the Sector Bionica with your presence. You are already acquainted with Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar — it is she who has been tending to the ancient relic. She is here to convey the wretchedness of our present position."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, danke, dass Ihr den Sektor Bionica mit Eurer Gegenwart beehrt. Triebwerksmeisterin Zi-Ra Tallar kennt Ihr ja bereits ... sie hat sich um das alte Relikt gekümmert. Sie ist hier, um die Nichtswürdigkeit unserer derzeitigen Position weiterzuleiten."

languages.text: “大人，感谢您亲临仿生区。您已经见过驱动大师扎拉·塔拉了，是她一直在照料这件古老圣物。她此番前来是要向您禀明我们目前的不幸处境。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, thank you for gracing the Sector Bionica with your presence. You are already acquainted with Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar — it is she who has been tending to the ancient relic. She is here to convey the wretchedness of our present position."

traits.locale_text: “大人，感谢您亲临仿生区。您已经见过驱动大师扎拉·塔拉了，是她一直在照料这件古老圣物。她此番前来是要向您禀明我们目前的不幸处境。”

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, gracias por conceder el honor de su presencia al Sector Bionica. Ya conoce a la maestra de motores Zi-Ra Tallar. Es ella la que ha estado cuidando de la antigua reliquia. Está aquí para comunicarle lo lamentable de la situación actual».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, thank you for gracing the Sector Bionica with your presence. You are already acquainted with Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar — it is she who has been tending to the ancient relic. She is here to convey the wretchedness of our present position."

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, gracias por conceder el honor de su presencia al Sector Bionica. Ya conoce a la maestra de motores Zi-Ra Tallar. Es ella la que ha estado cuidando de la antigua reliquia. Está aquí para comunicarle lo lamentable de la situación actual».

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Sektör Biyonika'yı varlığınızla onurlandırdığınız için teşekkür ederim. Motor Üstadı Zi-Ra Tallar ile zaten tanışıyorsunuz. Kadim yadigârla bizzat ilgileniyor. Mevcut durumumuzun ne kadar sefil olduğunu iletmek için burada."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, thank you for gracing the Sector Bionica with your presence. You are already acquainted with Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar — it is she who has been tending to the ancient relic. She is here to convey the wretchedness of our present position."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Sektör Biyonika'yı varlığınızla onurlandırdığınız için teşekkür ederim. Motor Üstadı Zi-Ra Tallar ile zaten tanışıyorsunuz. Kadim yadigârla bizzat ilgileniyor. Mevcut durumumuzun ne kadar sefil olduğunu iletmek için burada."

languages.text: 「貴方様、セクター・ビオニカに御臨幸いただきありがとうございます。ドライブマスター・ジ・ラ・タルは御存じの通り、古代の遺物を手入れされております。彼女が、我々の現状の惨状を伝えて参りました。」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, thank you for gracing the Sector Bionica with your presence. You are already acquainted with Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar — it is she who has been tending to the ancient relic. She is here to convey the wretchedness of our present position."

traits.locale_text: 「貴方様、セクター・ビオニカに御臨幸いただきありがとうございます。ドライブマスター・ジ・ラ・タルは御存じの通り、古代の遺物を手入れされております。彼女が、我々の現状の惨状を伝えて参りました。」
